Interface UserDao

public interface UserDao
Data Access Object (DAO) interface for User entity. Declares CRUD operations for managing user accounts and preferences.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    delete(User user)
    Deletes a user from the database.
    int
    delete(User... users)
    Deletes multiple users from the database.
    long
    insert(User user)
    Inserts a single user into the database.
    List<Long>
    insert(User... users)
    Inserts multiple users into the database.
    List<Long>
    insert(Collection<User> users)
    Inserts multiple users into the database.
    LiveData<User>
    select(long userId)
    Retrieves a user by their ID.
    LiveData<List<User>>
    selectAll()
    Retrieves all users from the database, ordered by username.
    LiveData<User>
    selectByEmail(String email)
    Retrieves a user by their email address.
    LiveData<User>
    selectByOauthKey(String oauthKey)
    Retrieves a user by their OAuth key.
    LiveData<User>
    selectByUsername(String username)
    Retrieves a user by their username.
    int
    update(User user)
    Updates an existing user in the database.
    int
    update(User... users)
    Updates multiple existing users in the database.

  • Method Details

    • insert

      long insert(User user)
      Inserts a single user into the database.
      Parameters:
      user - User instance to insert.
      Returns:
      ID of the newly inserted user.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(Collection<User> users)
      Inserts multiple users into the database.
      Parameters:
      users - Collection of users to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted users.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(User... users)
      Inserts multiple users into the database.
      Parameters:
      users - Variable number of users to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted users.

    • update

      int update(User user)
      Updates an existing user in the database.
      Parameters:
      user - User instance with updated values.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • update

      int update(User... users)
      Updates multiple existing users in the database.
      Parameters:
      users - Variable number of users with updated values.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • delete

      int delete(User user)
      Deletes a user from the database.
      Parameters:
      user - User instance to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • delete

      int delete(User... users)
      Deletes multiple users from the database.
      Parameters:
      users - Variable number of users to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • select

      LiveData<User> select(long userId)
      Retrieves a user by their ID.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the user, or null if not found.

    • selectByUsername

      LiveData<User> selectByUsername(String username)
      Retrieves a user by their username.
      Parameters:
      username - Username to search for.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the user, or null if not found.

    • selectByEmail

      LiveData<User> selectByEmail(String email)
      Retrieves a user by their email address.
      Parameters:
      email - Email address to search for.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the user, or null if not found.

    • selectByOauthKey

      LiveData<User> selectByOauthKey(String oauthKey)
      Retrieves a user by their OAuth key.
      Parameters:
      oauthKey - OAuth authentication key.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the user, or null if not found.

    • selectAll

      LiveData<List<User>> selectAll()
      Retrieves all users from the database, ordered by username.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of all users.
